content.speakerText: I should probably head out—my sister’s waiting in the car.
content.speakerTextCn: 我该走了，我姐在车里等我。
expectedAnswers: No problem! Let’s grab coffee next week and swap trail pics?
Thanks for the map—I’ll message you tomorrow!
Oh okay, see you around! Maybe we can hike together next month?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌结束对话并留出再会空间
语言准确性：语法和用词是否自然正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常对话习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'next week', 'message', 'see you around'

expectedAnswers: You too! And don’t forget—text me your favorite snack for the hike!
Thanks, you too! Catch you soon!
Will do! Let’s plan that coffee next week?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应祝福并主动强化后续联系
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'text me', 'catch you soon' 等口语表达
表达自然度：语气是否轻松、不生硬，符合朋友间对话氛围
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'text', 'soon', 'plan', 'next week' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I’ve got to run—the bus is coming!
expectedAnswers: No worries! Let’s grab a bite next weekend?
Thanks for the talk! I’ll send you that recipe I mentioned.
Catch you later—have a good one!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否在紧急告别中仍创造未来互动机会
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的口语表达如 'grab a bite', 'catch you later'
表达自然度：是否避免生硬结束，语气友好且符合情境紧迫感
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'next weekend', 'send', 'catch you' 等自然收尾关键词
